reviews.review_description: Im not going to give it a one because it is a good concept for a game and it looks good for when it came out. However the game is pretty glitchy, things dont lineup like pouring drinks on the table instead of the glass, and the heads up display for things is in a pretty bad place. I think that many of the other problems with this game could have been solved if they would have waited to release it later.

developer_response.body:
Hi YourLocalBiologist,
Appreciate you taking the time, glad the core idea came through.
Some fair points on interactions and HUD. We made improvements post-launch, but understand it impacted your experience. That said, we’re really proud of how Peaky Blinders VR captured the tone and world of the show for many players.

Thanks for the honest feedback.

reviews.review_title: A fun trip into an awesome show
reviews.review_description: The immersion was awesome! Even the tiny detail of smoking a cigarette added to making me feel like a (wannabe) Peaky Blinder. I wish it would be longer and it would be awesome to continue to story, but it's worth the price alone just to walk where Tommy Shelby did.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! We're really glad you enjoyed stepping into Tommy's world and that the little details helped bring the experience to life. We would have loved to tell an even longer story too, and it's great to hear you'd like to spend more time there. Thanks for taking the time to leave a review and for supporting the game.

reviews.review_title: Amazing Story, Wish It Was Longer
reviews.review_description:
Peaky Blinders: The King’s Ransom delivers an immersive experience that captures the gritty atmosphere of the Peaky Blinders world. From the moment the story begins, you’re pulled into the dark, tense environment of post-war Birmingham, filled with intrigue, danger, and strategic decision-making.

The narrative is one of the game’s strongest elements. It feels authentic to the Peaky Blinders universe, with strong dialogue, morally complex choices, and the constant pressure of navigating loyalty, power, and survival. Fans of the show will appreciate how the story expands on the world while still maintaining the tone and intensity that made the series so popular.

The adventure and interactive elements keep things engaging, allowing players to feel like they’re truly part of the Shelby operation. The pacing mixes suspenseful moments with action and problem-solving, which helps keep the experience entertaining throughout.

My only real complaint is that I wish it were longer. The story was so engaging that I ended up finishing it in a single weekend. It left me wanting more because the world and characters were so well done.

Overall, if you're a fan of Peaky Blinders or narrative-driven adventure games, The King’s Ransom is definitely worth experiencing. It successfully blends storytelling and interaction in a way that makes you feel like you’ve stepped directly into the Shelby family's dangerous world.

developer_response.body:
Hi spicycapricorn888, Really appreciate this, great to hear the story, tone, and world landed for you. And yes… we hear you on wanting more. Always a good problem to have, but noted.
Thanks for playing and taking the time to share this.

reviews.review_description:
This game is a great example of what VR experiences should be. It’s essentially a short interactive movie that you get to take part in. The atmosphere is excellent, the interactivity feels natural, and the physics and mechanics work really well. The world feels alive — you can literally reach out and touch it.

There are two main drawbacks:

1. The shooting feels very basic, more like a shooting gallery with mannequins.

2. Characters don’t always behave in line with the scene — the scripting can be weak.

Otherwise, it’s a memorable and genuinely impressive experience.

developer_response.body:
ezobnin, Thanks for the detailed review,  really appreciate you taking the time to share it. Great to hear the atmosphere and interactivity stood out, that’s a big focus for us.

Also appreciate the notes on the shooting and character behavior - it’s valuable to hear how those moments land for players.

reviews.review_description: Say can I get my money back please the game kept crashing and it wouldn't work please give me refund

Sorry to hear about the crashes, that’s understandably frustrating.
Please reach out to support@maze-theory.com and the team will be able to help. For refunds you can also contact the platform support directly.

developer_response.body:
Hey Antizionist! Thanks a lot for reviewing the game and letting us know your experience regarding the safe code. I would love to help you solve this issue. 

You can check out this video and skip to 1:24:37 to see the user enter the code and open the safe. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZjLn9Zqv_DE

If you feel like you are completing this step correctly and the safe is still not opening, you can find a debug switch for the safe behind the divider on the left hand side. make sure you feel all the way down behind the divider and underneath to activate the switch. Please let me know if you require more assistance! Thank you

When I purchased this, I was expecting a good game as I'm a big fan of the show. At a quick glance, it's OK, but then I learnt the game crashes so much that it ruins the game play completely. 

There are so many bugs in the game, I would avoid this at all costs. The scenery is beautiful, but the gameplay seriously needs work. The camera turning is so disjointed as well, which I  think sucks as this would have improved the game. but it feels kinda rushed and not very user-friendly. 

If I could, I would get a refund as it crashed that much. However, when I messaged the creators; they just ignored me! 

What a waste of time and money 💰 😒 😡

Rubbish game ✅️

Rubbish creator's ✅️

Rubbish customer service ✅️

reviews.review_description: As a huge fan of the show, I was so excited that the VR game was a thing. Played the through the trial and immediately purchased when the time was up. I felt like I was truly a member of the Pinky Blinders. From the moment I lit up a cigarette, followed by having to get rid of the traitor. It brought me back to how much I loved that show. The developers did a great job recreating that era. I’m going to take my time with this one, I don’t want it to end too fast.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the five stars! We're so happy to hear you enjoyed the game as much as you did, especially as a fan of the show. The beauty of VR is how immersive it is, so it's great to read that you felt like a member of the Peaky Blinders.

reviews.review_title: Fun but needs alot of work...
reviews.review_description:
It's a fun game with a good storyline but the game breaking glitches and constant vomit- inducing stuttering simply walking around that occur need to be resolved..no excuse for this not being sorted for the quest 3 update.  I am on a quest 3 for context.

So much pop in as well it just feel like the game is in beta...graphics are acceptable enough but the characters look so dead eyed...

One glitch, If you do not get in front of two characters they completely block your path when trying to  open a door using a wheel...you just can't get past them...you have to restart...

The worst thing for me is the stuttering in the game please fix...no excuse for this on quest 3.

developer_response.body:
Hi fonejackerjon

Apologies to hear that you're experiencing issues with staggering and running on a Quest 3. This hasn’t been reported before, and we have not experienced any issues internally or during testing. The game currently runs at an average of 71.2 frames per second.

We’d love to help dig into this a bit more with you to see if we can assist. Please feel free to drop us an email at support@maze-theory.com.

reviews.review_description: By the time I realized I hated this game, i had played past the maximum time to still be allowed a refund.  So I kept playing.  This game feels like one long intro scene.  Like I kept waiting for the game to start and it just kept dragging on.  Don't buy this. Please.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear this Jboogie. With Peaky Blinders: The King's Ransom we set out to create an immersive, authentic 1920s Birmingham experience and we hope this came across. If you're after more gameplay, be sure to check out the free post-game DLC for more missions and challenges.

reviews.review_title: Wasn't worth the time to download
reviews.review_description:
Game had great potential but fell short, story is decent, but it plays like an old playsation 1 game from the 90's. Puzzles aren't puzzles and this plays more like a scavenger hunt than anything. To many things to collect, collectibles are literally everywhere. Found 3 or 4 in the same spot.

Maps aren't open ended. Your on a path and can't deviate or look around, the combat is absolutely ridiculous, Enemy has 100% accuracy and never miss, there's ammo laying around everywhere which doesn't matter because it will respawn as soon as you pick it up.

I was hopeful for the game. But it wasn't good. Not for me anyway.

developer_response.body: Hi there. Thanks for the feedback. We created Peaky Blinders VR primarily as an immersive narrative game, so we're glad that you enjoyed the story. It's a shame you felt let down by the other aspects, but thanks for giving the game a chance.

reviews.review_description:
I’m a diehard Peaky Blinders fan, so the expectation is pretty high. The game play is somewhat reminiscent of the show, and the graphics are pretty incredible. The mechanics are what you would expect for a FPS game.

Have played it twice so far each time better than before.
Well done developers for bringing PB to VR

It's a really good game everything that I was looking for bit the only thing is that for £25.00p you would think that it would be alot longer of a game I got it yesterday 8:45 and I've just finished it now but like I say its a really good game

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! I am so happy to hear that you enjoyed our game. 

We do have more to come later down the line ;) Keep an eye on our socials! Until then, please do check out all the areas in the game as there are collectible items dotted around for you to find if you haven't already 🖤

Edit - *** Psst, listen closely Peaky Blinder we have an important announcement! We have dropped some new content, alongside this, there will be more to come. Check out our YouTube Channel to take a peaky at our new FREE content roadmap ***

reviews.review_description: http://tiny.cc/g265vz for 25% off! Awesome game! The game is really fun but the lack of character diversity is a bit annoying. A lot of the bad guys are the same bad guys. But it’s cool that they got the actors from the show to do the voices, and the story itself in the game is really fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review! We are delighted to hear that you have enjoyed playing our game and are grateful for this feedback, definitely something we will keep in mind for future releases :)

reviews.review_description: Very good wish it was longer but very good 🙂

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review! :) We are delighted to hear that you have enjoyed living out your gangster life in our game. 

Please check it out again to make sure you haven't missed anything, there are lots of different areas to explore and items to find too! We are working on new additions too, watch this space!

Edit - *** Psst, listen closely Peaky Blinder we have an important announcement! We have dropped some new content, alongside this, there will be more to come. Check out our YouTube Channel to take a peaky at our new FREE content roadmap ***

reviews.review_description: I can’t believe I paid £25 for a game that I completed in 2 and bit hours, rip off.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. I We're so sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy our game :( 

We are continuing to listen to the community and will be making improvements to the game with more in-game content & new features in the coming months. We would really appreciate it if you could take some time to drop us your feedback on what you didn't like here so we can take this into account where suitable for future releases and updates: 

peakysupport@emergent-entertainment.com

Edit - *** Psst, listen closely Peaky Blinder we have an important announcement! We have dropped some new content, alongside this, there will be more to come. Check out our YouTube Channel to take a peaky at our new FREE content roadmap ***

reviews.review_description: The game is amazing. I love it. Maybe add more tools in combat but otherwise its perfect.
